summary: Architecture: Python sidecar brain service + TypeScript OpenClaw plugin, PostgreSQL+pgvector, full cognitive scope
Embedding model: gemini-embedding-001 at 3072 dimensions (max Matryoshka resolution) for precise gut feeling
Brain integration plan v2 saved to KB/blueprints/v0.1_brain_integration_plan.md — 9 phases, full cognitive architecture

Updated KB_01_architecture.md: added Phase 3 section with layers.py details, context_assembly.py pipeline, new API contracts, gate wiring status DONE, updated dependency graph, L0/L1 JSON structures
Unified memory: discard L0/L1 layers, identity emerges from Beta weights in unified memory table. layers.py to be deleted, gate/context rewired to use top-N DB memories.
DJ-001 [memory]: L0/L1 layers discarded for unified memory. L0/L1 was a derived cache of the memory table, not a source of truth. Remove middleman.

Created v0.2_unified_memory_rework.md: exhaustive modification plan for reworking Phase 3 to unified memory (delete layers.py, rewire gate to top-N DB memories, remove PUT /identity + identity_update tool, update context_assembly). All future phases simplified.

T-P3 unified memory rework (D-005): deleted layers.py, rewrote context_assembly.py (render_identity_hash/full from DB, removed layers param), rewrote api.py (_get_identity_embeddings from DB via embedding::float4[] cast, removed LayerStore/PUT identity/IdentityUpdateRequest), removed identity_update tool + brainUpdateIdentity from plugin
T-P3 rework verified: python syntax check passes (api.py, context_assembly.py), no LayerStore/layers.py/identity_update references in codebase (only historical comments), layers.py deleted

Rewrote KB_01 Phase 3 section for D-005 unified memory: removed L0/L1 layers.py docs, documented _get_identity_embeddings (DB query + float4[] cast), render_identity_hash/full from DB, removed PUT /identity + identity_update tool, updated gate wiring table source, updated dependency graph

Phase 7 verified: python syntax check passes (safety.py, api.py, consolidation.py), isolated unit test confirms HardCeiling blocks at 0.95, DiminishingReturns reduces gain by log2(evidence), audit log captures all events, immutable bypass works

Phase 8 Bootstrap Readiness complete: brain/src/bootstrap.py (BOOTSTRAP_PROMPT, Milestone dataclass, BootstrapReadiness class with 10 DB-direct milestone checks, render_status), api.py wired (BootstrapReadiness in lifespan, GET /bootstrap/status, BootstrapStatusResponse, v0.7.0)

Updated KB_01_architecture.md: added Phase 8 section (bootstrap.py details, 10 milestones, API endpoint, updated dependency graph)
Session 11 complete: Phase 8 Bootstrap Readiness (bootstrap.py + api.py v0.7.0). All brain phases 0-8 done. 19 endpoints, 13 modules.

LLM backend: switched from Anthropic Claude Haiku to Google Gemini 3 Flash Preview. Anthropic OAuth tokens (Max subscription) not permitted for non-Claude-Code use per Anthropic policy. GOOGLE_API_KEY already available for embeddings, reused for LLM.

DJ-002 [llm]: Anthropic Haiku replaced by Gemini 3 Flash Preview. Reason: Max subscription OAuth tokens restricted to Claude Code/Claude.ai only. Google API key already in use for embeddings — single key for both embed + LLM.
Dockerfile: /app/state dir owned by root, brain user (UID 1000) got PermissionError. Fixed: mkdir + chown before USER switch.
Converted openclaw from git submodule to inlined files. Repo is now self-contained — clone and run anywhere without upstream access.

Full integration test: docker compose up, all 19/19 endpoints return 200. Store→retrieve→gate→assemble cycle works. Consolidation deep cycle runs with Gemini Flash LLM. Safety, DMN, bootstrap all responding.
Updated KB_01_architecture.md: LLM backend change (Anthropic→Gemini Flash), integration test results, D-006 decision journal entry
